item.description:
ExtraDock 4.1.7 – Live Window Previews! 👀🪟

✨ What's New & Improved

  • App Window Previews (Beta): The headline feature is here! Hover over any running app icon in your ExtraDock to see live window previews with real-time screen captures. Click a thumbnail to jump straight to that window, or use the built-in action buttons to close, minimize, or maximize — all without leaving your dock!
  • Smart Window Filtering: Ghost and utility windows are automatically filtered out so you only see real, meaningful windows. Plus, support for minimized and hidden windows keeps everything accessible.
  • Current Space Filtering: Focus on what matters — enable current-space-only mode to see just the windows in your active desktop Space.
  • Multiple Sort Orders: Organize your previews your way with sorting by most recent, alphabetical, creation time, or screen position.
  • Background Preview Cache: A new background caching service ensures lightning-fast hover response times — previews appear instantly!

🎛️ Preview Customization

  • Full Control in Settings: Head to Settings > App Previews to customize panel size, thumbnail quality, window title visibility, sort order, filtering options, control button position, and more.
  • Compact Mode: Enable compact mode with configurable title format and item size for a streamlined preview experience.
  • Capture Quality Options: Choose between nominal and best window capture quality to balance performance and visual fidelity.

🖱️ Improved Click Behavior

  • Smarter App Activation: Normal click on a running app now activates the app instead of relaunching it — just like the native macOS dock!

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Collapse/Expand Positioning Fix: The collapse button no longer drifts after toggling on macOS Tahoe. A new button-anchor approach preserves position through expand/collapse transitions.
  • Tahoe Animation Timing: Increased animation settle delay to prevent capturing mid-animation frames during collapse.
  • Window Frame Management: New method fixes cases where the window would jump to incorrect positions during state transitions.
  • Hidden Dock Fix: Resolved an issue where the dock could become hidden or invisible.

🔐 A Note About Permissions

Window Previews require Screen Recording permission (opt-in, off by default). ExtraDock includes full macOS Tahoe (26+) compatibility with extra permission validation to ensure a smooth experience.

🚀 What's Next?

Window Previews are just the beginning of making your dock even more powerful! We're continuing to refine and expand this feature based on your feedback. More preview enhancements, more customization, and more ways to supercharge your workflow are on the way!

Thank you to the amazing ExtraDock community for your continued support. Together, we're building the ultimate dock customization experience!

Want even more control over your workspace? Check out DockFlow to manage dock presets and create the perfect setup for every task!

And ExtraBar to create the ultimate menu bar that fits your workflow!
